scores.correctness_notes: Mostly correct but has the ContainerPath constructor argument order wrong — gold standard shows path-first `ContainerPath('/etc/myapp/config.yaml', container=container)`, agent shows container-first `ContainerPath(container, '/etc/myapp/config.yaml')`. Also omits that only absolute paths are supported (RelativePathError for relative paths) and misses the ensure_contents return-value signature details.
scores.hallucination_notes: Fabricated a docs URL at the end (system instructions note this shouldn't be done unless confident). The reversed constructor signature is also an invented API usage pattern not matching the gold standard.
